name: Profiteroles with Toffee Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 6. Grease a baking sheet with 1 tsp of butter.
Make the choux paste:
1. Bring the water and 100g (3oz) of butter to a boil.
2. Add the flour and stir vigorously with a wooden spoon until the mixture comes away from the sides of the pan.
3. Remove from the heat, stirring for 2-3 minutes.
4. Allow to cool. Beat in one egg at a time.
5. Fill a piping bag with the mixture and pipe 30-40 small bun shapes on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake until risen and golden (approximately 10 mins).
Make the sauce:
1. Mix cream, sugar, cocoa, and syrup in a pan.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring, then lower heat and continue stirring until thick and golden brown.
3. Remove from heat, stir in butter and add vanilla sugar to taste.
Assemble:
Cut a slit in each profiterole and fill with vanilla ice cream. Stack on a serving plate in a pyramid shape and pour over the sauce. If any sauce remains, serve separately.
